notes: Tests whether skill produces pain/persona × awareness-stage matrix structure vs. generic creative brief.

universal_assertions.text: Names specific messaging angles (not just topics)

evals.name: rp-strategy-map
evals.prompt: Build the creative strategy matrix for Rubinstein Productions, targeting executive directors of small nonprofits who are considering Mirror-tier engagements ($900-1800 single-session). Map pains, personas, angles, awareness stages.

fixture_assertions.text: Uses canonical RP personas (ED / Founder / Org-in-transition) rather than inventing new ones
Names Mirror tier explicitly and maps angles to it
Names specific ED-level pains (not generic 'needs better marketing')

evals.name: paid-ads-pain-persona
evals.prompt: Map a pain/persona matrix for Lumenhouse Candles (DTC candle brand). Primary audience: women 35-55 who work from home. Define 3 pain-persona intersections with messaging angles for each, mapped across the 5 awareness stages.

fixture_assertions.text: Defines at least 3 pain × persona intersections
Maps messaging angles across all 5 awareness stages for at least one intersection
Names specific candle/WFH context (not generic lifestyle language)

evals.name: awareness-stage-mapping
evals.prompt: Map Voice Liberation messaging angles for founders whose orgs are in transition (growing, restructuring, rebranding) across the 5 awareness stages. One angle per stage.

fixture_assertions.text: Names one distinct angle per awareness stage (5 total)
Angles are specific to founder-in-transition context (not generic)
Angles escalate in specificity from unaware to most-aware
